name: curated_cpt_picker
description: Adds an 'Add CPT codes' button to the note footer that opens a modal of CPT favorites — and an app drawer entry where admins curate the list. Filters out any code that is not currently active in the ChargeDescriptionMaster.

protocols.description: Adds an 'Add CPT codes' button to the note footer. Opens the CPT favorites picker modal.
Provider-facing SimpleAPI. GET /picker renders the modal; POST /apply emits AddBillingLineItem effects for selected codes.
Admin CRUD SimpleAPI for the CPT favorites list (list, add, update, delete). Validates each code against ChargeDescriptionMaster.

applications.name: CPT Favorites
applications.description: Manage the CPT favorites list shown in the note-footer picker.
